title: poa kengii
intro: Poa kengii, also known as Keng's blue grass, is a type of grass native to China and is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa kengii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Poa kengii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are typically used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever and digestive issues.
